description_long: This is a large, rectangular desk constructed from dark wood or wood-like material, featuring a robust and sturdy build. The front side includes a cabinet door on the left and two vertically stacked drawers on the right, both with simple round knobs for easy access. The desktop surface is broad and flat, with a circular cable management hole near the back edge for organizing wires. The back and sides of the desk are plain, with solid panels that reinforce its structure and provide a clean, finished look. The overall design is utilitarian yet modern, suitable for professional or home office environments. The finish is matte, giving the desk a subtle, understated appearance.
description: A large, dark wood desk with a cabinet, two drawers, and a cable management hole, featuring a matte finish and sturdy construction.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cabinet door on the left, two drawers on the right, and a cable management hole on the desktop.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a solid panel and the depth of the desk, with the cable management hole visible on the desktop.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, solid back panel with no visible drawers or doors, and the cable management hole on the desktop.
description_view_3: Right side view with a solid panel and the cable management hole visible on the desktop.
attribute_orientation: The side with the cabinet door and drawers is intended to face the user, with the cable management hole positioned at the back of the desktop for wire organization.
